chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1058 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.5790/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection and reply as at “A” 3. For orders on M.A. No.5791/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 24.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Abdul Razzaque son of Lal Bux seeks protective bail in FIR No.04/2022, registered at P.S. ACE Kandhkot for offence under section 161, 409, PPC read with section 5 of the PCA-II of 1947. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case in order to humiliate and disgrace him; that applicant was unaware about registration of instant case against him and now he came to know about pendency of this case; that he is a law abiding citizen and intends to surrender before the concerned Court but he feels apprehension of his arrest at the hands of ACE Officials in the wake of NBW issued against, hence he needs some protection to enable him to appear before the Court concerned. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused above named, for a period of five days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.15,000/- (Rupees fifteen thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Operation of NBW issued against the applicant/accused is suspended for five days. Applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith.

Operation of NBW issued against the applicant/accused is suspended for five days. Applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of five days from today or whenever applicant surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
